message:
Running command: # GlobalPlacement is now RUNNING! GPL-0326 is resolved.
# Overflow starting at 0.9921 - needs to converge to ~0.1 or below
# Monitor progress every 90 seconds
sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log

tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log"}
